Event: Magic Well - December 2023
Event Date: 01/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: T84


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Shadow Control Totem

Once in a while, entangles 3 random enemy fighters with roots and increases received damage by 35% for 4 sec. Entangled fighters cannot move for 4 sec. They are also blinded and miss with a 50% chance.

Requirements: 90
